rationale: The citing article is explicitly a conceptual comment on Novemsky and Kahneman (2005), reviewing that paper’s experiments and methodological choices (e.g., probabilistic buying/selling and BDM procedure). Its stated contribution is to extend and critique NK’s boundary account by adding moderators (emotional attachment, cognitive perspective), indicating substantive engagement rather than a passing mention; the reference is also an exact DOI match (10.1509/jmkr.42.2.119.62292).
